description: Fix missing diacritics in Spanish card.name.* and card.effect.* translations, and optionally improve RegionDetailModal getMonsterInfo pattern.
steps: Step 1: Fix all missing diacritics in card.name.* and card.effect.* entries in src/i18n/es.ts
Step 2: Optionally improve RegionDetailModal.tsx getMonsterInfo to accept t as parameter
Step 3: Run npm run build to verify
acceptance_criteria: All card.name.* and card.effect.* Spanish translations use correct diacritics
Project builds successfully with npm run build
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm exit code 0
